name: Doppler
description: Monitor Doppler secrets management - verify project configurations and team member access for secrets hygiene compliance

config.setupInstructions:
Option 1 - Service Account Token (recommended, requires Team or Enterprise plan):
1. In the Doppler dashboard, go to Team in the left navigation
2. Select the Service Accounts tab
3. Click the + button to create a new service account
4. Assign a workplace role with read access
5. Generate a token for the service account and copy it (starts with dp.sa.)

Option 2 - Personal Token:
1. In the Doppler dashboard, go to the Tokens page, then select Personal
2. Generate a Personal Token and copy it (starts with dp.pt.)

Note: Service Tokens (dp.st.*) will NOT work - they are project-scoped and cannot access workplace-level endpoints needed for compliance checks.

credentialFields.label: Doppler Token
credentialFields.helpText: A Personal Token (dp.pt.*) or Service Account Token (dp.sa.*) with workplace-level access. Service Tokens (dp.st.*) will NOT work.

checks.name: Secure Secrets
checks.description: Verifies Doppler projects are configured for secrets management across environments

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Doppler workplace members and their access roles
